items.name: MONSOON by STORDIS
items.description: MONSOON is STORDIS's open-source network monitoring exporter for SONiC devices, providing affordable telemetry collection from routers and switches.

items.name: Aviz Network Copilot
items.description: An AI-powered network management assistant that delivers intelligent insights, automated troubleshooting, and conversational operations for SONiC-based networks.
